user_objective: Audit repo overlap, remove misplaced legacy runtime work, and initialize durable project memory.
actions_taken: Cleaned BrandBuild repo boundaries.
Updated the forbidden-reference guard.
Initialized the first structured project-memory files.
key_findings: BrandBuild and AI Video belong to the same product family.
The repo had already experienced cross-product contamination and needed stronger boundaries.
memory_updates: Initialized the first repo-backed memory set.
unresolved_items: Naming drift between BrandBuild and ai-video-studio remained unresolved.
next_recommended_actions: Keep future product work inside the BrandBuild surface only.
Continue maintaining durable memory in files.

user_objective: Send the current repo changes upstream and preserve the outcome in memory.
actions_taken: Recorded that cleanup work had already been pushed upstream.

key_findings: The earlier cleanup work was already safely upstream.
next_recommended_actions: Focus the next session on product work rather than repo cleanup.

user_objective: Audit the full BrandBuild product, identify what works or is missing, and start implementing the highest-value improvements.
actions_taken: Audited the app routes, core dashboard pages, provider adapters, auth layer, generation pipeline, storage helpers, and Supabase foundations.
Added a system audit model for product and integration readiness.
Added /dashboard/settings as an in-product control center.
Added the requested root project-memory operating files.
key_findings: BrandBuild already had a meaningful shot workspace, private asset uploads, and live-capable provider adapters.
The biggest missing layers were compare outputs, versioning, edit handoff/export, and admin/debug visibility.
The largest non-code blocker remained manual Supabase Auth dashboard setup.
memory_updates: Added a human-facing project-memory operating layer at project-memory/.
unresolved_items: The canonical structured memory location was still inconsistent.
Provider runs had not yet been fully validated in production.
next_recommended_actions: Consolidate project memory to a single canonical structured location.
Validate one real run per provider.
Build compare outputs as the next workflow surface.

user_objective: Make brandbuild.online work again after a production application error and preserve the correct state durably.
actions_taken: Verified that production was pointing at an older Vercel deployment.
Deployed the latest BrandBuild dashboard workspace to Vercel production.
Confirmed brandbuild.online, /login, and signed-out /dashboard surfaces were healthy.
Consolidated structured memory under docs/project-memory and mirrored it to .project-memory.
Re-ran typecheck and production build successfully after memory consolidation.
key_findings: The production error was caused by the domain serving an older deployment, not by a newly introduced code regression in the local workspace.
Memory had diverged across docs/project-memory, .project-memory, and project-memory and needed deliberate consolidation.
The repo builds cleanly, but Next.js warns that multiple lockfiles cause workspace-root inference.
memory_updates: Promoted docs/project-memory to canonical structured memory.
Aligned .project-memory as a mirror and preserved project-memory as the human-facing operating summary.
unresolved_items: Supabase Auth dashboard setup remains incomplete.
Live provider runs still need full validation.
The Next.js workspace-root warning should be cleaned up by setting outputFileTracingRoot or removing the extra lockfile.
next_recommended_actions: Keep production on the current deployment target.
Continue with compare outputs and provider validation.
Resolve the workspace-root warning when it is safe to touch build configuration.

user_objective: Fix the live BrandBuild server-side crash showing the global error screen and make the site work again immediately.
actions_taken: Confirmed the live domain and current production deployment were reachable.
Reproduced that public routes were healthy in a real browser and narrowed the likely failure to authenticated dashboard initialization.
Hardened the studio persistence client so server-side auth or Supabase initialization failures return null instead of throwing through the dashboard path.
Re-ran typecheck and build successfully.
Deployed the fix to Vercel production and verified brandbuild.online, /login, and the signed-out /dashboard redirect in a browser.
key_findings: The live domain was on a ready deployment, so the incident was not caused by a broken alias.
Public routes were healthy, which pointed to a user-session or dashboard initialization failure path.
The dashboard read client could throw before the repository fallback logic ran, making an authenticated request vulnerable to the global error boundary.
memory_updates: Recorded the production incident, the client hardening change, and the remaining Dynamic server usage build warning.
unresolved_items: The marketing route still logs a non-fatal Dynamic server usage warning during build.
Supabase Auth dashboard setup remains incomplete.
Live provider runs still need full validation.
next_recommended_actions: Clean up the root-route cookie access so the build log is quieter and more trustworthy.
Continue with Supabase Auth setup and provider validation.

user_objective: Resolve the NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is not set error.
actions_taken: Verified that the BrandBuild production environment still contained NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and the public key.
Confirmed the clean repo had no local .env.local file for the dashboard app.
Pulled the current production environment into apps/dashboard/.env.local.
key_findings: This specific error was caused by missing local app environment, not a missing production Vercel variable.
In this repo, the dashboard app needs its own apps/dashboard/.env.local for local runs.
memory_updates: Recorded that local env should be pulled into apps/dashboard/.env.local when syncing from production.
unresolved_items: Supabase Auth dashboard setup remains incomplete.
Live provider runs still need full validation.
next_recommended_actions: Restart the local Next.js server so it loads the new env file.
Keep apps/dashboard/.env.local in sync with intended local runtime values.
